Description:
Scaffold the Next.js 16 frontend with static export config, JobCard, FilterBar, and ScrapeButton components connected to the FastAPI backend.

SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
STORIES: 4.1 - 4.4

Scaffold frontend/ with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, MUI 7, TanStack Query, Zustand, and Zod.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- npx create-next-app@latest frontend --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir
- Install: @mui/material @emotion/react @emotion/styled @tanstack/react-query zustand zod
- Set output: 'export' and trailingSlash: true in next.config.ts (required for Nginx static serving)
- Configure TanStack Query provider in app/layout.tsx
- Configure Zustand store stub in lib/store.ts
- Create .env.local.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/api/v1
- Verify next build produces /out directory

EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-1

TESTING CRITERIA:
- npm run dev starts without errors
- npm run build produces /out directory
- No TypeScript errors on clean build
- MUI and Tailwind styles both apply without conflict

EDGE CASES:
- output: 'export' disables Server Actions and Route Handlers — all data fetching must go through FastAPI /api/*
- MUI requires ThemeProvider wrapper — add to layout.tsx

Create frontend/components/JobCard.tsx displaying job title, company, source badge, and relevance score.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Props: job: Job (import from types/job.ts — mirrors backend Job model)
- Display: title (h3), company (p), location (p), source badge (chip with source_id label), relevance_score (if present: percentage bar or numeric label)
- Add scraped_at formatted as relative time (e.g. 2 hours ago)
- Link title to job.url opening in new tab
- Use MUI Card component as container
- Apply Tailwind utilities for spacing and typography
- Add hover elevation effect via MUI Card elevation prop

EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Renders with all required fields
- Source badge colour differs per source (linkedin=blue, jobserve=green)
- relevance_score omitted gracefully when null
- Link opens in new tab with rel=noopener

EDGE CASES:
- Long job titles truncated with ellipsis (max 2 lines)
- Missing company field renders as Unknown company

Create frontend/components/FilterBar.tsx with source and keyword client-side filters.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Props: onFilter: (filters: FilterState) -> void
- FilterState type: { sources: string[]; keyword: string }
- Source filter: checkboxes for each registered source (linkedin, jobserve) — fetched from GET /api/v1/jobs sources metadata or hardcoded for MVP 1
- Keyword filter: text input with debounce (300ms) using useEffect
- Use Zustand store to persist filter state across re-renders
- Filtering is client-side — no API call on filter change
- Clear all button resets both filters

EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24, JD-25

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Keyword filter narrows JobCard list in real time
- Source checkboxes show/hide jobs by source
- Clear all resets list to full unfiltered set
- Filter state persists on page re-render (Zustand)

EDGE CASES:
- Empty keyword input shows all jobs
- Deselecting all sources shows empty state message

Create frontend/components/ScrapeButton.tsx that triggers POST /api/v1/scrape and shows in-progress state.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Use TanStack Query useMutation for POST /api/v1/scrape
- Button label: Scrape Jobs (idle) | Scraping... (loading) | Done (success, 2s then reset)
- Disable button while mutation is pending
- On success: display toast/snackbar with per-source counts from ScrapeResult.results
- On error: display error snackbar with status code and detail message
- Use React 19 useTransition for non-blocking state update
- MUI Button with CircularProgress spinner overlay when loading

EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24, JD-23

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Button triggers POST /api/v1/scrape on click
- Loading state disables button and shows spinner
- Success shows result counts per source
- Error shows human-readable message

EDGE CASES:
- Double-click prevented during pending state
- Network timeout shows error message (not silent failure)

Implement the jobs router with cursor-based pagination, full OpenAPI spec, admin process scripts, and GitHub Actions CI skeleton.

SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Backend / Infrastructure
STORIES: 5.1 - 5.4

Create backend/routers/jobs.py with GET /api/v1/jobs (paginated) and GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- GET /api/v1/jobs: query params page_size (default 20, max 100), cursor (opaque string)
- Response: JobListResponse with total, page, page_size, has_next, next_cursor, linkedin_count, jobserve_count, jobs list
- Implement cursor-based pagination over fake_db list (encode cursor as base64 offset for MVP 1)
- Filter by keyword query param if provided (delegate to filter_jobs())
- GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}: return single Job or 404 HTTPException
- All responses use Pydantic response_model for automatic OpenAPI generation
- Log request params via get_logger

EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-18, JD-17

TESTING CRITERIA:
- GET /api/v1/jobs returns paginated list
- has_next=true when more results exist
- next_cursor allows fetching next page
- GET /api/v1/jobs/unknown-id returns 404
- linkedin_count and jobserve_count accurate

EDGE CASES:
- Empty fake_db returns empty jobs list (not 500)
- page_size > 100 clamped to 100
- Invalid cursor returns 400

Ensure all routes are fully typed with Pydantic request/response models and auto-generated OpenAPI docs are accurate.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- All endpoints use response_model= parameter
- All request bodies use Pydantic BaseModel subclasses
- Add summary= and description= to each endpoint decorator
- Add tags= to each APIRouter
- Verify /docs and /redoc render without errors
- Add example values to Pydantic models via Field(example=...)
- Ensure ScrapeResult, Job, JobListResponse all appear in /docs schemas

EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-28, JD-23

TESTING CRITERIA:
- /docs accessible and all endpoints listed
- Request and response schemas shown for every endpoint
- Example values render in docs UI

EDGE CASES:
- UUID fields need explicit JSON schema type annotation

Create backend/admin/ directory with seed_keywords.py, clear_db.py, and stubs for replay_dlq.py and run_evals.py.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- seed_keywords.py: read KEYWORDS list from filters.py; print each keyword; stub for future Supabase insert
- clear_db.py: call clear_jobs() from main.py fake_db helpers; log cleared count; include DEV ONLY warning comment
- replay_dlq.py: stub with TODO comment — implemented in MVP 2 (Story 10.4)
- run_evals.py: stub with TODO comment — implemented in MVP 1.1 (Story 7.1)
- All scripts use get_logger; all import settings from settings.py
- All scripts runnable via: uv run python admin/{script}.py

EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-17, JD-18

TESTING CRITERIA:
- seed_keywords.py runs without errors and prints keyword list
- clear_db.py empties fake_db and logs count
- Stub scripts exit 0 with informative TODO message

EDGE CASES:
- Scripts must not import uvicorn or any server-start code

Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with linting, type checking, testing, and Docker build steps.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Trigger: on pull_request and push to main
- Jobs: lint-backend, lint-frontend, test-backend, test-frontend, docker-build, check-workflow-docs
- lint-backend: pip install uv; uv sync; uv run ruff check backend/; uv run mypy backend/
- lint-frontend: npm ci; npx eslint frontend/; npx tsc --noEmit
- test-backend: uv run pytest backend/tests/ -v --tb=short
- test-frontend: npm run test (Vitest)
- docker-build: docker build -t job-discovery:ci .
- check-workflow-docs: test -f docs/tasks/todo.md && test -f docs/tasks/lessons.md
- Cache: pip/uv cache, node_modules cache

EFFORT: M (5 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure / CI
DEPENDENCIES: JD-2, JD-12

TESTING CRITERIA:
- All jobs trigger on PR
- Lint failure fails build
- Docker build runs in CI successfully
- check-workflow-docs fails when files missing

EDGE CASES:
- Playwright install not needed in CI (scraper agents mocked in tests)
- Matrix strategy not needed for MVP 1 (single Python version)
